attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks in 3-4km to go window, excelling on steep uphill finishes where bike-throw timing and explosive power deliver stage wins. Capable of distancing elite fields with mid-distance (3.5km) accelerations.
team_tactics: Minimal evidence of team setup; appears to operate independently or with limited domestique support. Leadership claims based on personal attacking aggression rather than team-orchestrated moves.
terrain_preference: Steep uphill finishes and short, punchy climbs where explosive power and technical finish skills (bike throws) create advantages. Cold and rainy conditions significantly enhance performance.
vulnerability: Time trials represent critical weakness, losing 2+ minutes despite strong TTT capabilities. Gap between team TT skills and individual ITT performance suggests pacing or sustained power limitations.
key_patterns: Attacks in 3-4km window repeatedly: Alto de la Tía (4km), Paris-Nice (3.5km) both successful.
Exploits technical finish skills: bike throw victory at Dauphiné, 6-second gain on steep gradient.
Weather-dependent performance: explicitly targets cold/rainy conditions, delivered two Vuelta wins in preferred weather.
TT vulnerability pattern: dropped 2+ minutes at Dauphiné despite team TTT podium same event.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed both elite attacking (only matching Pogačar) and severe TT weakness, suggesting punch remains but stage-racing viability compromised
